model_data.sql:
WITH t2 AS (
  SELECT
    t8.customer_id AS customer_id,
    MIN(t8.order_date) AS first_order,
    MAX(t8.order_date) AS most_recent_order,
    COUNT(t8.order_id) AS number_of_orders
  FROM dev.orders AS t8
  GROUP BY
    1
), t4 AS (
  SELECT
    t8.customer_id AS customer_id,
    t8.first_name AS first_name,
    t8.last_name AS last_name,
    t2.first_order AS first_order,
    t2.most_recent_order AS most_recent_order,
    t2.number_of_orders AS number_of_orders
  FROM dev.customers AS t8
  JOIN t2
    ON t8.customer_id = t2.customer_id
), t0 AS (
  SELECT
    t8.id AS id,
    t8.user_id AS customer_id,
    t8.order_date AS order_date,
    t8.status AS status
  FROM raw.raw_orders AS t8
), t1 AS (
  SELECT
    t0.id AS order_id,
    t0.customer_id AS customer_id,
    t0.order_date AS order_date,
    t0.status AS status
  FROM t0
), t3 AS (
  SELECT
    t8.payment_id AS payment_id,
    t8.order_id AS order_id,
    t8.payment_method AS payment_method,
    t8.amount AS amount,
    t8.amount_in_dollars AS amount_in_dollars,
    t1.order_id AS dev_orders_order_id,
    t1.customer_id AS customer_id,
    t1.order_date AS order_date,
    t1.status AS status
  FROM dev.payments AS t8
  JOIN t1
    ON t8.order_id <> t1.order_id
), t5 AS (
  SELECT
    t3.customer_id AS customer_id,
    SUM(t3.amount_in_dollars) AS total_amount
  FROM t3
  GROUP BY
    1
), t6 AS (
  SELECT
    t4.customer_id AS customer_id,
    t4.first_name AS first_name,
    t4.last_name AS last_name,
    t4.first_order AS first_order,
    t4.most_recent_order AS most_recent_order,
    t4.number_of_orders AS number_of_orders,
    t5.total_amount AS total_amount
  FROM t4
  JOIN t5
    ON t4.customer_id = t5.customer_id
)
SELECT
  t7.customer_id,
  t7.first_name,
  t7.last_name,
  t7.first_order,
  t7.most_recent_order,
  t7.number_of_orders,
  t7.total_amount AS customer_lifetime_value
FROM (
  SELECT
    t6.customer_id AS customer_id,
    t6.first_name AS first_name,
    t6.last_name AS last_name,
    t6.first_order AS first_order,
    t6.most_recent_order AS most_recent_order,
    t6.number_of_orders AS number_of_orders,
    t6.total_amount AS total_amount
  FROM t6
  ORDER BY
    t6.customer_id DESC
) AS t7
